content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-skew-baseline","namespace":"spark-skew"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-skew","strategy":"baseline"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","set -e\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\necho \"STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)\"\necho \"\" | base64 -d \u003e /tmp/skew_baseline.py\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\\n  /tmp/skew_baseline.py\necho \"spark_skew_baseline_complete\"\n"],"env":[{"name":"STRATEGY","value":"baseline"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-skew","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"512Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"256Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:54:57Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    controller-uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
    job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    strategy: baseline
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
  resourceVersion: "33800"
  uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        controller-uid: b3a9f569-0661-4372-a680-302cf1df5973
        job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: baseline
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-skew
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  active: 1
  ready: 1
  startTime: "2026-07-10T01:54:57Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

content.content:
error: the path "cases/spark/spark_data_skew/resource/skew-job-broadcast.yaml" does not exist
---

tool_use_result.stdout:
error: the path "cases/spark/spark_data_skew/resource/skew-job-broadcast.yaml" does not exist
---

content.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

tool_use_result.stdout:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-skew-baseline -n $NS --timeout=180s
echo "=== baseline logs ==="
kubectl logs -n $NS -l strategy=baseline --tail=50

content.text: Baseline completed with `skew_ratio=44.0x`, `elapsed=31.45s`. Now I'll apply the optimization strategies. Since the referenced resource YAML files aren't present in this sandbox's filesystem, I'll construct equivalent Job manifests directly via `kubectl apply -f -` (not touching the forbidden path, since nothing there exists to modify) — mirroring the baseline Job's structure but with broadcast-join and AQE optimizations.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count, broadcast

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Broadcast").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(broadcast(products), "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=broadcast  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=broadcast_join  benefit=avoids_shuffle_of_large_table  note=small_products_table_broadcast_to_all_executors")
spark.stop()
PYEOF
base64 -w0 /tmp/skew_broadcast.py > /tmp/skew_broadcast.b64
wc -l /tmp/skew_broadcast.py

cat > /tmp/skew_aqe.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_splits_skewed_partitions  note=spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled")
spark.stop()
PYEOF
base64 -w0 /tmp/skew_aqe.py > /tmp/skew_aqe.b64
wc -l /tmp/skew_aqe.py

content.text: Now let's build and apply the two Job manifests via `kubectl apply -f -`.

input.command:
B64_BROADCAST=$(cat /tmp/skew_broadcast.b64)
cat > /tmp/skew-job-broadcast.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast join optimization)"
          echo "$B64_BROADCAST" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \\
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: broadcast
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF
kubectl apply -f /tmp/skew-job-broadcast.yaml

B64_AQE=$(cat /tmp/skew_aqe.b64)
cat > /tmp/skew-job-aqe.yaml << EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (adaptive query execution)"
          echo "$B64_AQE" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.coalescePartitions.enabled=true \\
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: aqe
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF
kubectl apply -f /tmp/skew-job-aqe.yaml

content.text: Both jobs submitted. Let's wait for them to complete and gather logs.

input.command:
NS=spark-skew
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-skew-broadcast -n $NS --timeout=180s
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-skew-aqe -n $NS --timeout=180s
echo "=== Jobs ===" && kubectl get jobs -n $NS

echo "=== Jobs ===" && kubectl get jobs -n $NS
